semantic.role: Vitest test suite for the WindowsDPAPIBackend credential backend, verifying secure secret passing via stdin in PowerShell execution.
responsibilities: Test that secrets are passed through stdin to PowerShell rather than interpolated into command strings, preventing command-line leakage.
Mock child_process.execFileSync to capture PowerShell invocation arguments and verify they do not contain secret values.
Ensure afterEach hooks restore mocks, reset modules, and clean environment variables for test isolation.
outOfScope: Integration testing with real Windows DPAPI or other credential backends.
Testing the credential store or non-Windows credential backends.
Performance or load testing of credential operations.
invariants: The file must end with .test.ts to comply with the test-file-suffix rule.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: This test file enforces a security invariant of the credential subsystem: secrets must never appear in command-line arguments of external processes.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Added a test to verify that secrets are passed through stdin instead of being interpolated into PowerShell commands.
